name: Verdaccio
tagline: Verdaccio is a simple, zero-config-required local private npm registry. No need for an entire database just to get started! Verdaccio comes out of the box wit
description:
Verdaccio is a simple, zero-config-required local private npm registry. No need for an entire database just to get started! Verdaccio comes out of the box wit


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  verdaccio:
    image: verdaccio/verdaccio:3.11.6
    volumes:
      - verdaccio-storage:/verdaccio/storage
      - verdaccio-conf:/verdaccio/conf
      - verdaccio-plugins:/verdaccio/plugins
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment: {}
    ports:
      - 42133:4873
volumes:
  verdaccio-storage: null
  verdaccio-conf: null
  verdaccio-plugins: null
